entries.title: War Ends Without Total Vong Extermination

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.
continuity.notes: Development deck. Keep separate from Disney canon and later post-NJO Legends unless a later deck is active.

content.fact: The Yuuzhan Vong War ends through defeat, surrender, relocation, and hard settlement rather than simple extermination of the species.
content.injection: In Yuuzhan Vong War Ends, postwar, do not treat every Yuuzhan Vong as dead; use disarmament, exile/settlement, guilt, and survival consequences.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Yuuzhan Vong War Ends.
Respect story-position bounds from Yuuzhan Vong War Ends to Yuuzhan Vong War Ends.
